mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0) AS collection_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collection_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0) AS item_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0) AS note_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND deleted = 0) AS unread_notify_count
